    debug - Static variable in class tailFinder.view.game.GamePane
     
    DebugText - Class in tailFinder.view.component
    Display text component for debug information.

    DiamondOrePane - Class in tailFinder.model.block.solid
    Represents a Diamond Ore block in the game world.

    Constructs DiamondOrePane with light blue background and diamond ore texture.

    DirtBlockPane - Class in tailFinder.model.block.solid
    Represents a Dirt block in the game world.

    Constructs DirtBlockPane with brown background and dirt texture.

    Represents the Dog (objective) block in the game world.
